ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., software development, DevOps, research) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., normal, high, low) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., bug, feature, research) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size estimate of the task */,
  "lane" TEXT /* Lane or stage of the task (e.g., to-do, in progress, done) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the task */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the task */,
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lane the task is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_lane_id FOREIGN KEY ("lane_id") REFERENCES lanes ("lane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_versions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lanes" (
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane */,
  "lane_name" TEXT /* Name of the lane */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lane */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lane was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the lane */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, team lead, developer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user's role in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_users" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was assigned to the task */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user's role in the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id", "user_id")
)
